rasionalisasi: Excitotoxin, can trigger hyperactivity and neurological symptoms in sensitive children.
Can cause inflammation and affect gut-brain axis, worsening behavioral symptoms in autism.
Similar to gluten, broken down into casomorphins which can cross blood-brain barrier and affect behavior.
Artificial dye linked to increased hyperactivity and attention deficits in children.
Breaks down into aspartic acid and phenylalanine, which can act as neurotoxins and alter brain chemistry.
